name: slowbeardigger/xmr-pay-adapter-core
description: Platform-agnostic core for building Monero payment adapters on the xmr-pay PHP engine. Per-order subaddress, fiat to XMR, monero: URI, and a reusable poll-based settlement loop over a storage contract. The shared layer behind the HikaShop, VirtueMart and J2Store gateways.

scripts.test: for t in gateway settler; do echo "-- $t --"; php tests/$t.test.php || exit 1; done
